issues.claim_in_outline: DDT thinned eagle eggshells; a thin, cracked eagle eggshell crushed under the parent.
issues.description: The reference lists DDT as a biomagnified toxin but says nothing about eggshell thinning, eagles, or any bird. The eggshell/eagle specifics are outside knowledge not present in the reference.
issues.suggested_fix: Either drop the eggshell/eagle detail or label it clearly as supplementary background not drawn from the module reference.

issues.claim_in_outline: A dead zone the size of a US state forms in the Gulf of Mexico; fertilizer from a thousand miles upstream.
issues.description: Reference confirms the Gulf of Mexico dead zone from eutrophication, but gives NO size figure ('size of a US state') and no '1,000 miles upstream' distance. These quantitative/geographic specifics are unsupported.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the 'size of a US state' and 'thousand miles' figures, or flag them as illustrative, not from the reference.

issues.claim_in_outline: Nitrogen — huge atmospheric pool (N2, 78% of air).
issues.description: The reference does not mention nitrogen's atmospheric percentage (78%) or even nitrogen-cycle details (N is only referenced as a contrast 'unlike C and N, no atmospheric component'). The 78% figure is outside knowledge.
issues.suggested_fix: Drop the '78% of air' figure; reference only supports that N (and C) have an atmospheric component, unlike P.

issues.claim_in_outline: Gulf of Mexico dead zone off Louisiana, fed by Mississippi River runoff.
issues.description: Reference supports 'Gulf of Mexico' dead zone but does not name Louisiana or the Mississippi River. Those geographic specifics are not in the reference.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove 'Louisiana' and 'Mississippi River' or mark as supplementary; reference supports only 'Gulf of Mexico'.

issues.claim_in_outline: DDT thinned eagle eggshells; toxins are fat-soluble and not excreted; concentration ~10x per step (0.01 → 0.1 → 1 → 10 ppm).
issues.description: Eagle eggshell thinning is not in the reference (see 02_hook). The 'fat-soluble / not excreted' mechanism is also not stated in the reference. The ppm ladder numbers are explicitly illustrative (clean made-up values), which is acceptable.
issues.suggested_fix: Drop or flag the eggshell and fat-solubility claims as outside the reference; the illustrative ppm ladder is fine as labeled.

issues.claim_in_outline: Coral bleaching = corals expel symbiotic algae; callback to coral/zooxanthellae mutualism from M13.
issues.description: Reference confirms 'coral bleaching' as a term but does not describe the mechanism (expelling symbiotic algae) or use 'zooxanthellae' / a M13 mutualism. This is supplemental, not contradictory.
issues.suggested_fix: Treat the bleaching mechanism and zooxanthellae callback as supplementary; reference supports only the term 'coral bleaching'.

issues.claim_in_outline: Ocean acidification chemistry: CO2 + H2O → carbonic acid, lowering pH.
issues.description: Reference lists 'ocean acidification' as a term only; it does not give the chemical reaction (CO2 + H2O / carbonic acid) or pH mechanism. The formula is outside knowledge but consistent with the topic.
issues.suggested_fix: Flag the CO2+H2O/carbonic-acid formula as supplementary mechanism not stated in the reference.

issues.claim_in_outline: Light bottle measures NPP; dark bottle measures respiration; GPP = NPP + R.
issues.description: Matches the reference exactly: 'light bottle measures NPP; dark measures respiration; difference + dark = GPP.' Definitions are consistent, not contradicted.

issues.claim_in_outline: Illustrative DO values: initial 8, light 10, dark 5 mg/L; NPP=2, R=3, GPP=5.
issues.description: Per instructions, the light/dark bottle pause arithmetic uses made-up clean DO numbers and is acceptable as illustrative. The definitions used (NPP=light−initial, R=initial−dark, GPP=NPP+R) match the reference.
issues.suggested_fix: No change; numbers are illustrative as permitted.

overall_assessment: Core science definitions (phosphorus cycle no-atmosphere, eutrophication oxygen-depletion mechanism, biomagnification vs bioaccumulation, light/dark bottle NPP/R/GPP) all align with the reference and none contradict it. Issues are unsupported SPECIFICS layered on top: eagle eggshell thinning, 'dead zone the size of a US state', '1,000 miles upstream', Louisiana / Mississippi River, N2 = 78% of air, fat-soluble/non-excreted toxin mechanism, the CO2+H2O carbonic-acid formula, and the zooxanthellae/M13 coral mutualism — none appear in the reference text. The light/dark bottle pause arithmetic is acceptable illustrative content and its definitions are correct. Verdict: minor — fix or flag the unsupported specifics; no core definition contradicts the reference.
